reviews.comment:
Desastrosa la atención!!!Día domingo, un solo playero para atender 4 surtidores, después de esperar 25 minutos me informan que no aceptan tarjetas y no funciona el serviclub. NO ES LA PRIMERA VEZ QUE PASA!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service was disastrous!!! On a Sunday, there was only one attendant to manage four pumps. After waiting 25 minutes, they informed me that they don't accept cards and the service club isn't working. THIS IS NOT THE FIRST TIME THIS HAS HAPPENED!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbzZHQzBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar agradable para hacer una parada en el camino.
Ambiente algo retro, precios no muy baratos (usuales a los que se cobra en estaciones de servicio por un café)
Lo destacado de este lugar es la atención al público en general

(Translated by Google)
A pleasant place to stop along the way. The atmosphere is somewhat retro, and the prices aren't exactly cheap (about what you'd pay for a coffee at a gas station). The highlight of this place is its excellent customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3aDd5SVpnEAE
